meta.title: Sending Basic Training Letters with Sandboxx
meta.description:
As of February 10, 2018 Sandboxx Letters no longer include a pre-stamped return envelope.

Sending basic training letters to your loved ones is made better by Sandboxx. Take a picture and write a message on our app and we’ll do the rest. We convert it into a physical letter, mail it to your heroes and include a return envelope so they never miss a moment. 
 

To start sending letters to basic training and more, download the Sandboxx app today at https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube.

Get more from Sandboxx:

https://www.facebook.com/sandboxxapp/ 
https://twitter.com/sandboxx
https://www.instagram.com/sandboxxapp/
https://www.pinterest.com/sandboxxapp/
http://www.sandboxx.us/
